meta.title: Dashboard · PromptMarket
meta.description: Manage your listings, library, and wallet.

header.title: @{{username}}'s workshop
header.subtitle: Manage your listings, purchased library, and wallet balance all in one place.

empty.title: You haven't listed anything yet
empty.description: Publish your first listing and start earning.
empty.hint: List it free to build reputation first — you can change the price anytime.

empty.title: Your library is empty
empty.description: Listings you buy show up here. Start with something free.

empty.title: Nothing saved yet
empty.description: Tap the ♡ button in the lower-right of any listing card to add it to your wishlist.

wishlist.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete?

clearConfirm.title: Clear your wishlist?
clearConfirm.description: All saved items will be removed. This cannot be undone.

unavailable.note_one: {{count}} saved item is no longer available.
unavailable.note_other: {{count}} saved items are no longer available.
unavailable.title: Saved items are no longer available
unavailable.description: These listings were removed by their makers.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.note: This is a demo wallet, so top-ups are simulated instantly.
